scope_goal: Provide just enough shared card, action, and selection contract stability for the CLI now and the future Textual client later, without letting contract work outrun the engine loop.
scope_completed: Control-plane metadata repair: replaced stale unreachable source range and stale roadmap labels with locally resolvable branch evidence `28d8fa770226f4cc847edf0f637e2f7cb9db7042..871e367733fc44a27c4c5807edd8c2f4bda44af3` and canonical active MVP roadmap items.
kickoff_budget_note: This re-review packet is metadata-only and stays under the high-risk 4-task cap; no runtime A2UI, Textual, retrieval, daemon, or packet-planner source changes are part of this review surface.
approved_exception_note: Control-plane metadata repair was performed locally by packet_garden because cloud workers cannot reliably write `.codex/**` metadata under workspace-write sandboxing.
tasks_completed: Replaced stale source commit metadata with locally resolvable range `28d8fa770226f4cc847edf0f637e2f7cb9db7042..871e367733fc44a27c4c5807edd8c2f4bda44af3`.
